why: CHART: confirmed range-breakout trend leg - 3 straight green bars 7404->7425, new HOD, 7410 old-ceiling held as floor on retest, both momentum TFs positive, above VWAP. GEX CONFIRM: king/magnet migrated UP to 7450 (+27M pika) pulling price toward node above with ~25pts open air; 7410 pika floor (+19.9M) 15pts below = stop ref. Real floor + magnet above (not blocking wall) + clean air = long. Manage tight, cap under 7450, bail below 7410.

THESIS BROKEN: continuation-to-7450 failed. Magnet/king flipped back DOWN to 7410 (+23M, below spot), 7450 node shrank and lost king status. Price fading off HOD 7426.6->7418, 5-min momentum negative, +26M near-spot gamma re-pinning. Exit fast for small loss vs riding down to 7410 pin. Entry too extended (chased 100%-of-range top into heavy positive gamma) - the pin won, as feared.

CHART: decisive breakdown - 12:55 broke below 7388.6 prior low, closed on low 7386.5, below VWAP, 5-min momentum -0.13% accelerating. 7410-pin regime broken down. GEX CONFIRM (all 3 short conditions): (1) 7390 pika floor COLLAPSED off map, next floor 7360 = ~26pt air pocket; (2) NEGATIVE-gamma regime = levels break/trend/fuel; (3) strong 7410 ceiling overhead +28.7M caps bounces. Waited for the actual break vs anticipating. Target 7360-7365 air pocket, invalidate on reclaim above 7393.

THESIS FAILED: no downside follow-through. Breakdown to 7385.8 did NOT cascade to 7360 - instead 13:00 reclaimed 7392 shelf and price chopping 7389-7392. Regime firmly POSITIVE-gamma (levels hold/chop), 7410 ceiling ballooned +34M, negative-gamma fuel evaporated. Both exit conditions hit (reclaim 7392 + chop). Same failed-break chop as all day. Cut small loss vs bleeding theta.
